name: Deferred - Doubt - 2
description: Second returns for religious uncertainty and spiritual doubt.

results.description: [stat Faith -1] Doubt from {origin} finally altered not your words about faith, but the strength with which you could hold them.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [social -1] Spiritual uncertainty from {origin} became visible enough that others trusted your devotion less than before.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [stat Faith 1] The old doubt from {origin} led not to collapse, but to a harder and more examined faith.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] Doubt from {origin} was never wholly answered, only carried with more honesty than before.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [stat Faith -1] The questions from {origin} stripped away easy piety and left you with less certainty but more accuracy.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [social 1] Because you had faced doubt since {origin}, others later trusted the depth of your conviction more, not less.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] The old uncertainty from {origin} remained with you and colored every public act of belief thereafter.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [stat Faith 1] What began in {origin} as doubt matured into a tested faith no longer dependent on innocence.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [social -1] Your old uncertainty from {origin} became known to the wrong people and was judged more harshly than it deserved.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] Doubt from {origin} taught you mercy toward others whose certainties were less secure than they sounded.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [stat Faith -1] The spiritual strain from {origin} never fully broke you, but it did leave belief thinner and harder won.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [social 1] The struggle with faith that began in {origin} later made your counsel sound more honest than the certainties of easier souls.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] Doubt from {origin} came to rest not as peace, but as an accepted room within your belief.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [stat Faith 1] The old uncertainty from {origin} refined your faith by forcing it to survive scrutiny rather than inheritance.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [social -1] The questions from {origin} never found satisfying answers, only social cost and private persistence.
results.name: doubt-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The old doubt from {origin} ended by becoming part of your seriousness rather than the enemy of it.
